query:
SELECT j.id, j.jobStatus, j.updatedAt,
       COUNT(s.id) as totalScenes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingScenes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generatingScenes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedScenes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failedScenes
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510025
GROUP BY j.id, j.jobStatus, j.updatedAt;
